title: The Assam Rifles Act, 2006
full_text: The Assam Rifles Act, 2006 असम राइफल्स अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200647 Act Number: 47 Enactment Date: 2006-11-03 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Assam Rifles Act, 2006 Hindi Title: असम राइफल्स अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the governance of the Assam Rifles, an Armed Force of the Union for ensuring the security of the borders of India, to carry out Counter Insurgency Operations in the specified areas and to act in aid of civil authorities for the maintenance of the law and order and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 20-02-2006 Notification: 20th February, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 517(E) dated 20th February, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II sec.3(ii).
